sentences.arabic: الْمَشْيُ يَوْمِيًّا لِمُدَّةِ ثَلَاثِينَ دَقِيقَةً هُوَ عَادَةٌ صِحِّيَّةٌ.
sentences.translation: Svakodnevno hodanje u trajanju od trideset minuta je zdrava navika.
sentences.translationEn: Walking daily for thirty minutes is a healthy habit.

sentences.arabic: التَّمَارِينُ الرِّيَاضِيَّةُ تُسَاعِدُ فِي تَحْسِينِ الْمِزَاجِ وَتَقْلِيلِ التَّوَتُّرِ.
sentences.translation: Fizičke vježbe pomažu u poboljšanju raspoloženja i smanjenju stresa.
sentences.translationEn: Physical exercises help improve mood and reduce stress.

sentences.arabic: يُمْكِنُكَ مُمَارَسَةُ الرِّيَاضَةِ فِي الْحَدِيقَةِ الْعَامَّةِ أَوْ فِي النَّادِي الرِّيَاضِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Možete se baviti sportom u javnom parku ili u sportskom klubu.
sentences.translationEn: You can practice sports in the public park or at the gym.
